specs.name: ルミナコリジョン
specs.en: 100% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 2 stages.

specs.name: フレアソング
specs.en: 100% chance to raise user's Special Attack by 1 stage. Sound move; bypasses target's Substitute.

specs.name: ひやみず
specs.en: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

specs.name: ツインビーム
specs.en: Hits the target twice in one turn.

specs.name: アーマーキャノン
specs.en: After attacking, lowers user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage each.

specs.name: シャカシャカほう
specs.en: User recovers HP equal to half the damage dealt. 20% chance to burn the target. Can be used while user is frozen and thaws the user; also thaws the target's frozen status.

specs.name: みずあめボム
specs.en: 100% chance to inflict the Drenched (あめまみれ) status on the target: for 3 turns its Speed is lowered by 1 stage at the end of each turn.

specs.name: エレクトロビーム
specs.en: On turn 1, 100% raises user's Special Attack by 1 stage and charges; attacks on turn 2. In rain weather, attacks immediately without charging.

specs.name: きまぐレーザー
specs.en: About 30% chance for the move's power to double.

specs.name: みわくのボイス
specs.en: 100% chance to confuse for 1-4 turns any target Pokemon whose stat ranks rose during that turn (normally requires moving after the target, but a target whose stats rose on switch-in also qualifies). Sound move; bypasses target's Substitute.

specs.name: サイコノイズ
specs.en: 100% chance to inflict Heal Block (かいふくふうじ) on the target for 2 turns, preventing it from using healing moves and from recovering HP via abilities, items, or field states. Sound move; bypasses target's Substitute.
